CustomField.description: True when this permit is on the critical path — its absence blocks ROD/FONSI issuance. Drives nepa_blocked_permit_count__c rollup on IndividualApplication, which feeds NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer permit gap penalty. Populated from RegulatoryAuthorizationType at record creation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When checked, this permit must be issued before ROD or FONSI can be signed. Delays here directly extend the NEPA clock.
CustomField.label: Critical Path Permit
